Interpretation: Significant main effect of treatment: escape latency differs between treatment groups overall.
No significant main effect of injury: there is no evidence that escape latency differs between Naive and CCI mice overall.
Significant main effect of probe: escape latency differs between 0 mm and 5 mm probe conditions overall.
Significant Treatment × Injury interaction: the effect of treatment depends on injury state.
No significant Treatment × Probe interaction: there is no evidence that treatment effects depend on probe height.
No significant Injury × Probe interaction: there is no evidence that injury effects depend on probe height.
Significant Treatment × Injury × Probe interaction: treatment effects depend jointly on injury state and probe height. This supports targeted planned post-hoc comparisons.
